publications.title: MolmoWeb: Open Agent for the Web
publications.fullTitle: MolmoWeb: Open Multimodal Action Policy for the Open Web.
publications.tldr: An open visual web agent built on Molmo 2 that autonomously navigates websites by interpreting screenshots and executing browser actions like clicking, typing, and scrolling without needing structured page data.

publications.title: Molmo-Point: Better Grounding VLMs
publications.fullTitle: Better Pointing for VLMs with Grounding Tokens.
publications.tldr: A VLM architecture that replaces text-based coordinate generation with a token-based pointing mechanism, allowing the model to point by directly selecting parts of its input features for more natural and efficient visual grounding.

publications.title: Video Token Pruning for VLMs
publications.fullTitle: Unified Spatio-Temporal Token Scoring for Efficient Video VLMs
publications.tldr: A token pruning method for video VLMs that scores both spatial and temporal tokens to efficiently reduce input size while maintaining performance, enabling faster training/inference on long videos.

publications.title: Molmo 2: Open VLMs for Videos
publications.fullTitle: Open Weights and Data for Vision-Language Models with Video Understanding and Grounding
publications.tldr: A family of open-weight VLMs with state-of-the-art video understanding, pointing, and tracking capabilities, extending multimodal AI to analyze videos and multiple images with grounded spatial-temporal outputs.

publications.title: DivScene: VLMs for Object Navigation
publications.fullTitle: DivScene: Benchmarking LVLMs for Object Navigation with Diverse Scenes and Objects
publications.tldr: A large-scale dataset of 4,614 houses across 81 scene types for open-vocabulary 3D object navigation, showing that fine-tuned VLMs can surpass GPT-4o by over 20% in navigation success rates.

publications.title: Molmo: Open Multimodal Models
publications.fullTitle: Open Weights and Open Data for State-of-the-Art Multimodal Models
publications.tldr: A family of open-weight VLMs trained on PixMo, a collection of novel datasets including highly detailed image captions collected without relying on proprietary VLMs, achieving performance competitive with leading proprietary models.

publications.title: CoSyn: Code-Guided Synthetic Data
publications.fullTitle: CoSyn: Scaling Text-Rich Image Understanding via Code-Guided Synthetic Multimodal Data Generation
publications.tldr: A framework that uses text-only LMs to programmatically generate synthetic text-rich images and instruction-tuning data, achieving state-of-the-art text-rich image understanding that surpasses GPT-4V and Gemini 1.5 Flash.

publications.title: BACON: Concept Graphs as Caption
publications.fullTitle: BACON: Improving Clarity of Image Captions via Bag-of-Concept Graphs

publications.title: Articulate-Anything: Auto Articulation
publications.fullTitle: Articulate-Anything: Automatic Modeling of Articulated Objects via a Vision-Language Foundation Model

publications.title: Interpretable Model for Eye Cancer
publications.fullTitle: A Concept-based Interpretable Model for the Diagnosis of Choroid Neoplasias using Multimodal Data

publications.title: KnoBo: Knowledge Priors for Medical
publications.fullTitle: A Textbook Remedy for Domain Shifts: Knowledge Priors for Medical Image Analysis
publications.tldr: We introduce Knowledge Bottlenecks (KnoBo) that incorporate priors from medical documents, such as PubMed, through inherently interpretable models. KnoBo is robust to domain shifts in medical images, e.g., data sampled from different hospitals or data confounded by demographic variables such as sex, race, etc.

publications.title: Holodeck: Language Guided 3D World
publications.fullTitle: Holodeck: Language Guided Generation of 3D Embodied AI Environments
publications.videoCaption: a 1b1b apartment of a researcher who has a cat
publications.tldr: Holodeck is an automated system for generating diverse 3D environments in Embodied AI, using a large language model (GPT-4) and a vast collection of 3D assets from Objaverse.

publications.title: MiRAGeNews: Fake News Detection
publications.fullTitle: MiRAGeNews: Multimodal Realistic AI-Generated News Detection
publications.tldr: A multimodal fake news dataset for detecting AI-generated content.

publications.title: CoMo: Controllable Motion Generation
publications.fullTitle: CoMo: Controllable Motion Generation through Language Guided Pose Code Editing
publications.tldr: CoMo is a controllable human motion generation model that encodes motion into interpretable pose codes representing body part semantics.

publications.title: Visual Metaphors via GenAI
publications.fullTitle: I Spy a Metaphor: Large Language Models and Diffusion Models Co-Create Visual Metaphors
publications.tldr: We generate visual metaphors from linguistic metaphors using a collaboration between LLMs and Diffusion Models.

publications.title: LaBo: Language Guided Bottlenecks
publications.fullTitle: Language in a Bottle: Language Model Guided Concept Bottlenecks for Interpretable Image Classification
publications.tldr: LaBo leverages large language models (GPT-3) to automatically construct concept bottlenecks for any image classification tasks, making model decisions interpretable without manual concept specification.

publications.title: CREPE: Causal Reasoning in Procedures
publications.fullTitle: Causal Reasoning About Entities and Events in Procedural Texts
publications.tldr: We introduce CREPE, a benchmark for causal reasoning about event plausibility based on entity states.

publications.title: Z-LaVI: Visual Imagination for Text Tasks
publications.fullTitle: Z-LaVI: Zero-Shot Language Solver Fueled by Visual Imagination
publications.tldr: We endow language models with visual imagination capabilities, leveraging image retrieval and text-to-image generation to solve language tasks zero-shot.

publications.title: Noun Properties Prediction
publications.fullTitle: Visualizing the Obvious: A Concreteness-based Ensemble Model for Noun Property Prediction
publications.tldr: We extract properties of nouns from images, complementing language models to mitigate reporting bias.

publications.title: Hierarchies of Procedures from Web Data
publications.fullTitle: Show Me More Details: Discovering Hierarchies of Procedures from Semi-structured Web Data
publications.tldr: We develop an efficient method that links procedural steps in wikiHow articles to discover hierarchical task structures.

publications.title: Induce Schema for Video Retrieval
publications.fullTitle: Induce, Edit, Retrieve: Language Grounded Multimodal Schema for Instructional Video Retrieval
publications.tldr: We induce schemata from web videos and generalize them to improve video retrieval performance.

publications.title: Visual Goal-Step Inference using wikiHow
publications.fullTitle: Visual Goal-Step Inference using wikiHow
publications.tldr: We propose the Visual Goal-Step Inference (VGSI) task where a model must choose a plausible step towards a textual goal from candidate images.
